title: How Baxter Butted In
writer: Owen Davis, Julien Josephson, Harold Titus
actors: Dorothy Devore, Matt Moore, Ward Crane
plot: Poor Henry Baxter, a lowly clerk in a newspaper office, is in love with Beulah, the beautiful office stenographer, but Beulah barely knows he exists. As if Henry's unrequited love isn't bad enough, he has to put up with office man...
